description: Replay mode timing configuration. Controls how fast each demo phase plays when in REPLAY_MODE. Dashboard auto-advances through phases on these timers.

phases.description: Dashboard loads. Sol counter ticking. Zones green. 2 agent log entries scroll in.
CME alert banner appears. Countdown starts. Council debate streams in. Strategy comparison appears.
phases.transition_effect: background tint shift to amber over 1.5s

phases.description: Water gauge animates upward. Battery gauge climbing. Agent log shows AQUA/FLORA actions. KB query visible.
Background goes red. Solar drops. Triage cards appear. Physical prop dims. Fan stops.
phases.transition_effect: background tint shift to red over 1.0s

phases.description: Solar recovers. Green creeps back. New flight rule proposed. Post-event analysis.
phases.transition_effect: background tint shift to green over 3.0s

phases.description: Pitch closing. No new agent log entries. Dashboard returns to calm nominal state. Pitch lines overlay if enabled.

controls.note: ONE person on keyboard during demo. Assign this role in advance.
